metadata.title: Roomies
metadata.description: Gamified chores and shared expenses for roommates

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your Roomies account
auth.signUpDescription: Create your account to manage chores and expenses with roommates
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email using the link we sent, then try signing in again.
auth.confirmedSuccess: Email confirmed. You can sign in now.
auth.authCallbackError: Confirmation link is invalid or expired. Sign up again to request a new link.

onboarding.shareInvite: Share this invite code with your roommates
onboarding.createOrJoin: Create a new house or join one with an invite code

dashboard.leaderLeading: {name} is currently leading the pack with stellar household contributions.
dashboard.leaderDefault: See who is leading the house this week.
dashboard.noLeaderboard: No roommates on the board yet.
dashboard.logExpenseDesc: Split groceries, bills, or rent with everyone.
dashboard.allCaughtUp: All caught up! Check back for new tasks.
dashboard.addShoppingDesc: Log something you bought — price splits equally with everyone.

shopping.splitSolo: Only you in the house — no split needed.

chores.hubSubtitle: Keep the house happy, earn XP, and unlock rewards!
chores.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {# chore pending} other {# chores pending}}
chores.noActiveAdmin: No active chores. Tap Log Chore to add one.
chores.noActiveMember: No active chores. Ask your admin to add chores.
chores.pendingApprovalsCount: {count, plural, one {# submission to review} other {# submissions to review}}
chores.approveConfirm: Approve this completion? The member will receive {xp} XP.
chores.rejectConfirm: Reject this completion? The chore will stay active for the member to try again.
chores.reopenChoreConfirm: Reopen this chore? The XP awarded on completion will be removed from the member who earned it.
chores.xpEditCompletedHint: XP reward changes do not adjust XP already awarded for this completion.
chores.rewardsCta: Spend XP on house perks and fun privileges.

rewards.title: Rewards Shop
rewards.subtitle: Redeem your hard-earned XP for house perks everyone agrees to honor.
rewards.noRedemptions: No redemptions yet — be the first to claim a perk!
rewards.djCleanupDesc: You pick the playlist for the next group cleanup session.
rewards.pickFridayMovieDesc: Total control over the popcorn and the film choice.
rewards.comfyCouchWeekendDesc: Claim the best couch spot for the whole weekend.
rewards.deliveryPickDesc: When the house orders in, everyone eats from your restaurant choice.
rewards.vetoChoreAssignmentDesc: Pass a single assigned chore to another roommate.
rewards.skipDishDutyDesc: Pass your turn at the sink to another roommate.
rewards.trashImmunityWeekDesc: Skip trash duty for one full week.

ledger.netPositive: You're owed more than you owe.
ledger.netNegative: You owe more than you're owed.
ledger.settleAllConfirm: Mark all outstanding balances as settled?
ledger.soloHouseHint: Invite a roommate to start splitting expenses and tracking balances.
ledger.soloHouseMatrixHint: Balances appear once another roommate joins your house.
ledger.soloHouseAddHint: Saved for your records. Splits apply when roommates join.

settings.title: House Settings
settings.adminSubtitle: Manage your house, invite code, and roommates.
settings.memberSubtitle: View house info. Contact an admin to make changes.
settings.installAppDescription: Add Roomies to your home screen for a full-screen app experience on your phone.
settings.installAppIosSteps: On iPhone or iPad: tap Share, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.
settings.installAppDesktopHint: Open this site on your phone’s browser to install it to your home screen.
settings.removeConfirm: Remove this roommate from the house?
settings.transferConfirm: Transfer admin role to this roommate? You will become a member.
